overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a futuristic open-world game (Cyberpunk 2077), following a male character with a white hat and beard walking through a sunlit urban plaza. The character moves from an open green pedestrian area with market stalls into a covered concrete plaza with stairs and architectural features.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with market stalls adjacent to city street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the sunlit plaza, passing by food vendors and approaching a covered area

notable_agents.action: male pedestrian in brown jacket standing near the railing, looking toward the street

entered.detail: light green tiled pedestrian walkway with geometric patterns
green metal safety railing separating plaza from street level
colorful market stall with red and blue canopy and neon signage
large digital billboard displaying animated content on building facade

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a bright, open pedestrian plaza with light green paved flooring. To the left, a metal railing separates the walkway from a city street with passing vehicles, while colorful food vendor stalls line the right side. The area is fully exposed to midday sunlight with clear skies above.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered concrete plaza with architectural stairs and support columns

events.description: character moves from open sunlit plaza into a covered area with concrete architecture and overhead structures
character navigates around a concrete support pillar while continuing forward

agents.ego_description: proceeding through the covered plaza, navigating around concrete structures and passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: female pedestrian in brown dress walking up a ramp, moving opposite to the character's direction

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with multiple steps leading to upper level
large rectangular concrete column supporting overhead structure
smooth white concrete balustrade lining the walkway edge
elevated concrete bridge or walkway casting shadows below

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered urban plaza featuring heavy concrete architecture with stairs, support pillars, and overhead walkways. The lighting becomes mixed as sunlight filters through the structures, casting geometric shadows on the green artificial turf ground. The character navigates around a concrete pillar while a pedestrian in a brown dress walks in the opposite direction up a ramp.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open-air pedestrian walkway into a shaded, brutalist urban plaza. It begins in a sun-drenched area with light green paving, moving past colorful food vendor stalls on the right and a metal railing bordering a busy city street on the left. As the character advances, the open sky is replaced by heavy concrete architecture, shifting the lighting from direct midday sun to a mix of filtered light and geometric shadows. The scene then transitions into a covered space featuring support pillars and overhead walkways, where the camera navigates around a concrete column as a pedestrian in a brown dress passes by on a ramp.
